name: Diabetic Jam-Using Glycerine-Ripe Fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the fruit with water until it becomes soft.
2. Carefully remove as many stones as possible using a perforated spoon.
3. Add the saccharin tablets along with the glycerin to the mixture.
4. Continue boiling until the jam reaches the desired thickness.
5. Pour the mixture into small jars that have tightly sealed lids and store them properly.
